title: Fluent Python
subtitle: Clear, Concise, and Effective Programming
author: Luciano Ramalho
themes: The Python data model (dunder methods) as the unifying API of the language
Mastering the standard library's built-in data structures
Functions as first-class objects and the decorator pattern
Composition and protocols over inheritance for reusable code
Iterators, generators, and coroutines as control-flow abstractions
Reaching for metaprogramming (descriptors, class decorators) only when simpler tools fail
awards: Widely considered the definitive book on idiomatic Python
Python Software Foundation community recommended reading
Translated into multiple languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and Russian
excerpt: A deep dive into idiomatic Python 3 for intermediate-to-advanced developers. Luciano Ramalho guides you through the language's most powerful features — the data model, data structures, first-class functions, object-oriented idioms, control flow, and metaprogramming — so you can write code that is shorter, faster, and more readable.
